top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} and DELETE /books/{id} return 200 OK for a non-existent id instead of 404
top_findings.evidence: main.go:243-251 and main.go:260-267 branch on err.Error()=='sql: no rows in result set', but UpdateBook/DeleteBook use bs.db.Exec (main.go:106-116) which returns a nil error and never sql.ErrNoRows; RowsAffected is unchecked, so updates/deletes of missing ids silently succeed with 200
top_findings.suggestion: Inspect res.RowsAffected() after Exec and return http.StatusNotFound when it is 0
